property_rows.friction_treatment_summary: 3D CFD resolves viscous and pressure losses directly from the Navier-Stokes solution; no separate Darcy friction-factor input is carried in case_config. Blank two_d_friction_factor_* fields in the contract mean the reduced comparison table did not publish those derived factors, not that 3D friction is zero.
